name: China Maple Leaf Educational Systems Limited
summary: China Maple Leaf Educational Systems Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates bilingual private schools and preschools in the People's Republic of China and Southeast Asia. The company also offers dual-diploma curriculum, such as British Columbia curriculum and Chinese curriculum; and bilingual education services under the Canadian International School and Kingsley International School names. It operates bilingual private schools and preschools under the Maple Leaf brand name. As of October 15, 2020, the company operated 114 schools, including 18 high schools, 29 middle schools, 32 elementary schools, 32 preschools, and 3 foreign national schools. It also provides construction, technical support, catering, and stationary sales, water, and clothing related services, as well as vocational cultural exchange and overseas study services. China Maple Leaf Educational Systems Limited was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Dalian, the People's Republic of China.
